services.heading: How it works

steps.title: 1. Send us your product
steps.text: Ship a sample and set an affiliate commission on TikTok Shop. Supplements and wellness products are my specialty — it's where my audience already buys.

steps.title: 2. I create review content
steps.text: I produce the review videos myself — built around what actually converts on TikTok Shop: hooks, demos, and honest takes. No handoffs, no junior editors, no agency layers.

steps.title: 3. You watch GMV climb
steps.text: Content goes live across my accounts, and every attributed sale is verified in your own TikTok Shop Seller Center — not my slides. Full transparency.

services.note: Every engagement is performance-aligned — I earn the most when your product sells. One operator means limited slots: I onboard a small number of products each month, so category fit matters.

partnership.heading: Ways to partner
partnership.sub: Three engagement models. Every one keeps me invested in your sales — pick the level of priority your launch deserves.

tiers.name: Performance
tiers.text: Set an elevated, exclusive commission rate and your product enters my content rotation. You pay on attributed sales — the higher the rate, the higher your priority.

tiers.name: Retainer + Performance
tiers.text: A monthly retainer guarantees review videos and posting cadence across both accounts — plus commission on every sale. Predictable output, fully aligned incentives.

tiers.name: Exclusive
tiers.text: One brand per category. I never promote your competitors — your products own the niche across every account I run. Retainer + commission + performance bonuses.

contact.heading: Work with us
contact.subheading: Tell me about your product. I reply to every brand inquiry within 24 hours — and the person who replies is the person who makes your videos.
